changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Culture – Urètre'

changeSet.comment: Add localizations for urethral secretions tests

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Culture – Urètre'

changeSet.comment: Create Culture – Urètre test with Neisseria gonorrhoeae
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id, method_id, uom_id, description, loinc, reporting_description, sticker_req_flag, is_active, active_begin, active_end, is_reportable, time_holding, time_wait, time_ta_average, time_ta_warning, time_ta_max, label_qty, lastupdated, label_id, test_trailer_id, test_section_id, scriptlet_id, test_format_id, local_code, sort_order, name, orderable, guid, name_localization_id, reporting_name_localization_id, default_test_result_id, notify_results, parent_test_id, parent_trigger_value, is_culture_test, culture_type, is_flora_count_test) VALUES ( nextval('test_seq'), null, null,'Culture – Urètre','',null,null, 'Y', null,null,'Y',null,null,null,null,null,null,now(), null, null, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1),null,null,'Culture – Urètre',6280, 'Culture – Urètre', 't','f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-f123-456789012345', (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Culture – Urètre' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test report name' AND french = 'Culture – Urètre' LIMIT 1), null, 'N', null, null, true, 'NEISSERIA_GONORRHOEAE', false );

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Culture – Urètre';

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions urétrales'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.sampletype_test st JOIN clinlims.test t ON st.test_id = t.id WHERE t.name = 'Culture – Urètre'

changeSet.comment: Map Culture – Urètre to sample type
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test(id, sample_type_id, test_id) VALUES (nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Secrétions urétrales' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Culture – Urètre' LIMIT 1));
